headline: A Revolution in Cosmetic Dentistry
body: Dental N Veneers are a patented brand of ultra-thin porcelain veneers — roughly 0.2 mm thick, about the width of a contact lens — that are bonded directly over your natural teeth. Crafted from proprietary Cerinate porcelain, they require little to no enamel removal, making them a minimally invasive and often reversible procedure.
